title: Neethana Neethana Lyrics Unnai Thedi
stanzas:
Neethaanaa neethaana
en anbae neethaanaa
naanthaanaa paarthaena
en kannil neethaanaa(2)

en vaasal vandhadhu neethaana
enai thirudi sendradhu neethaana
en manadhai thindradhu neethaana
en kadhal kavidhai neethaana
en uyirai thottadhu neethaana
naane neethaanaa.

Neethaanaa neethaana
en anbae neethaanaa
naanthaanaa paarthaena
en kannil neethaanaa

ennil iruppadhu neethaana
en nenjil midhapathu neethaana
enai alli kudippathu neethaana
neeethaana neethaanaa

vetkam thanthadhu neethaana
en kanna sivappile neethaana
en udhattil inippadhum neethaana
neethaana neethaanaa

en kadhal haikoo neethaana
ada ennai padithadhu neethaana
naan kavidhai ezhutha
katru thandha
dhevathai neethaanaa

Neethaanaa neethaana
en anbae neethaanaa
naanthaanaa paarthaena
en kannil neethaanaa

kulirai virattum thee neethaana
theeyai anaikkum neer neethaana
en uyiril neendhuvadhum neethaana
neethaanaa neethaanaa

nilavin nizhazhumadi neethaana
kan simittum silaiyumadi neethaana
en sirikkum malarum adi neethaana
neethaanaa neethaanaa

en selai nuniyil neethaanaa
oru thoondil pottadhu neethaana
enai paithiyam pola thaniye
sirikka vaithathum neethaanaa

Neethaanaa neethaana
en anbae neethaanaa
naanthaanaa paarthaena
en kannil neethaanaa

en vaasal vandhadhu neethaana
enai thirudi sendradhu neethaana
en manadhai thindradhu neethaana
en kadhal kavidhai neethaana
en uyirai thottadhu neethaana
naane neethaanaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Neethana Neethana, the protagonists express their deep love and longing for each other, encapsulating the essence of romance. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Unnai Thedi, highlighting the emotional connection between the characters. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and warmth. The collaboration between Hariharan and Sujatha Mohan adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Neethana Neethana from the movie Unnai Thedi is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Hariharan and Sujatha Mohan, this song weaves a romantic tapestry that resonates with the heart. Experience the magic of Deva's composition that elevates this track to a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: You are my love, I see you in my eyes.
You came to my door, stole my heart, took my mind, my love is a poem, you touched my life, I am you.
You are my love, I see you in my eyes.
You are in me, my heart is filled with you, you are the one who gives me comfort.
You brought me shame, my eyes are red, sweetness is in my heart, you are everything to me.
My love is a haiku, you read it, I learned to write poetry from the goddess.
You are my love, I see you in my eyes.
The cool breeze brings fire, water quenches the fire, you are the one who makes me sleep in my life.
The moonlight shines, the statue glimmers, my smiling flower is you.
In my heart, you are the one who placed a mark, I feel crazy, laughing alone is you.
You are my love, I see you in my eyes.
You came to my door, stole my heart, took my mind, my love is a poem, you touched my life, I am you.
